tests.title: Verify chronological display of past conversations
preconditions: User has multiple past conversations across different dates
tests.expected_result: A list of all past conversations is displayed, ordered by the date and time of the last message.

tests.title: Verify conversation entry metadata display
preconditions: User has at least one past conversation
steps: Observe the details of a single conversation entry in the list.
tests.expected_result: The entry displays the specific date, the time, and a short text preview of the last message sent in that conversation.

tests.title: Verify full message history opens in read-only mode
preconditions: User has at least one past conversation
steps: Click on a specific conversation entry.
tests.expected_result: The full message history for the selected conversation is displayed and no text input fields or send buttons are visible.

tests.title: Attempt to modify a message in a past conversation
preconditions: User is viewing a past conversation history
steps: Click on an existing message within the history view.
Attempt to type or delete characters using the keyboard.
Right-click a message to look for edit or delete options.
tests.expected_result: The message text remains unchanged, no cursor appears for editing, and no modification options are available in the context menu.

tests.title: Verify empty state message for users with no history
preconditions: User account has zero previous conversations
steps: Log in to the application with the empty account.
tests.expected_result: An empty-state message is displayed on the screen indicating that no previous conversations were found.

tests.title: Verify retention of conversations exactly 90 days old
preconditions: User has a conversation where the last message was sent exactly 90 days ago
steps: Locate the conversation entry with a timestamp from 90 days ago.
tests.expected_result: The conversation is visible and accessible in the list.

notes:
The story does not specify the exact text for the empty-state message or whether the chronological order should be ascending or descending.

INPUT WARNINGS:
  • [input-guard:weak_context] Context package has 0 item(s) (minimum 1 for enriched mode to add value). Results may not differ from baseline generation.
